name: Scheduled Task Registry Cache (TaskCache)
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts that span multiple categories or serve specialized investigative purposes.
description: Registry-side cache of all scheduled tasks — mirrors the XML task definitions from C:\Windows\System32\Tasks. Contains task GUIDs, triggers, actions, and last-run/next-run times.
forensic_value: Scheduled task persistence evidence independent of the filesystem task XML (which can be deleted). The Tree subkey contains folder hierarchy; Tasks subkey stores binary blobs with full task definition. Cross-reference with Security log EID 4698/4699 and TaskScheduler/Operational 106/141.
